TESTS.NAME: M10_POSITION_LOCK
TESTS.WHY: ARCH+ v3 is an advanced M10 variant, not a new M23 module.

TESTS.NAME: FOUNDATION_GROUPS_PRESENT
TESTS.WHY: The ArchiPersona activation must always expose the six foundation columns.

TESTS.NAME: NO_INVENTED_FACTS
TESTS.ASSERT: PREFILL_RULES contains SUGGESTION and INCERTAIN handling
TESTS.WHY: Unknown user data must never become a fact.

TESTS.NAME: PERSONAE_LIMIT
TESTS.WHY: The article sets a maximum of four initial Personae.

TESTS.NAME: ARC_LIMIT
TESTS.WHY: The article sets a maximum of four initial ARC++.

TESTS.NAME: PRIMORDIA_GATE_PRESENT
TESTS.WHY: ARCH+ must be governed by truth and anti-drift rules.

TESTS.NAME: RAG_CORE_BOUNDARY
TESTS.WHY: ORA_CORE_RAG must not store client private profile payloads in core.

TESTS.NAME: GLG_ROUTE_PRESENT
TESTS.WHY: The module must declare its ORA_CORE_RAG implant path.
